title: Mempool Cluster Limits
description: Bitcoin Core limits each connected mempool cluster to a bounded transaction count and aggregate virtual size, replacing legacy ancestor and descendant limits so package admission, relay, replacement, and block-selection decisions remain computationally tractable.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 Release Notes: Cluster Limits
resources.notes: Defines the default 64-transaction and 101 kB virtual-size cluster limits and their replacement of ancestor/descendant limits.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core v31.0 Cluster Policy Configuration
resources.notes: Implementation configuration context for cluster policy limits and their node-level overrides.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Cluster Mempool
resources.notes: Explains why bounded clusters make chunk linearization and policy decisions computationally feasible.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for transaction packages, mempool policy, fees, and node operations.
